background: Homeworld: Haven/Vald (B000454-E). Grew up on asteroid belt stations. 'Ten Milli' earned nickname after salvaging a 10-million-credit medical unit to save three soldiers during combat. Pragmatic approach: cares about results, not politics.
education: Navy Medical School and Engineering certification
terms: Navy (Medical): Medic-1, Science (biology)-1, Admin-1. Medical training in naval service. Served on patrol cruisers. Advanced to rank 1.
Navy (Engineering): Mechanic-1, Engineer (life support)-1, Electronics-1. Cross-trained in engineering. Valuable dual-specialty operative. Advanced to rank 1.
Navy (Engineering): Mechanic-2, Vacc Suit-1. Specialized in life support systems and emergency repairs. Advanced to rank 2. Mustering out: Medical Kit, Mechanic's Toolkit.
Army (Support): Medic-2, Computer-1, Investigate-1. Transferred to Army for ground operations support. Combat medic role. Advanced to rank 1.
Army (Support): Mechanic-2. Recent operation against stubborn rebel force ended with rebels undefeated - frustrating lesson in limits of military power.

Agent (Intelligence): Electronics (sensors)-1. Recruited by SolSec for medical and technical support operations. Current assignment: Reversed Engineering operation. Advanced to rank 1. Mustering out: Emergency Med-Scanner, Vacc Suit, 5000cr.
interactions: Expertise: Combat medicine, field surgery, improvised repairs, life support systems, zero-gravity operations, diagnostic analysis
Weaknesses: Apolitical (doesn't care about ideology), sometimes too pragmatic (corners cut), limited patience for bureaucracy, squad-loyal over nation-loyal
